title: github-projects project.json
description: Binds a vault project to a GitHub Project board for one-way, deterministic board-sync. This file lives in the gitignored vault _harness/ and may carry the real local vault path under env — NEVER commit a populated copy into a public repo. All examples here use placeholder tokens (<owner>, <repo>, <vault>) for exactly that reason.

vault_project.description: The vault project slug whose roadmap/plan/progress state is synthesized onto the board (e.g. "crickets", "agentm"). project_sync.py reads this project's harness state and renders it through the per-type templates.

github.description: The target GitHub Project (v2) board and the repo whose Issues back its items.

owner.description: GitHub account that owns the Project (user or org login).

number.description: The Project's number — the N in /users/<owner>/projects/N.

url.description: Canonical Project URL. Optional: link construction derives it from owner+number when omitted (never hand-typed in rendered output).

repo.description: owner/name of the repo whose Issues back the board items, enabling native sub-issue nesting (Version -> Feature -> Sub-feature -> Plan -> Task) and Gantt roll-up.

project_surface.description: Render target. github-board is locked and the only surface shipping in v0.1.0; local-index (a vault-native markdown render target) and none are deferred follow-up modes of the same project_sync.py.

items_source.description: Path to the structured, agent-maintained board-items.json (the machine projection of the project's roadmap that project_model.py parses). Relative paths resolve against this project.json's directory; omit to use the sibling board-items.json. Real local paths live in the gitignored vault copy only — never in a committed file.

fields.description: Maps the frozen board field schema (Track . Type . Priority . Start . Target . Status) onto the Project's actual field names, for installs whose board uses different labels. Omit to use the canonical names verbatim.

track.description: Maps to the Track field (spans V4->V7 + Backlog + Ideas).

type.description: Maps to the Type field (Version . Feature . Sub-feature . Plan . Task . Backlog-item . Idea . Bug).

priority.description: Maps to the Priority field (P-tier P0-P3, fix-first at top).

start.description: Maps to the Start date field (YYYY-MM-DD).

target.description: Maps to the Target date field (YYYY-MM-DD).

env.description: Optional path overrides resolved at sync time. Real local paths live HERE in the gitignored vault copy only — never in a committed file. Keys are environment-variable names, values are absolute paths.

isolation.description: Controls whether the developer-workflows loop spawns a git worktree per plan and how it finalizes (PR vs direct push). Defaults to worktree-per-plan + pull-request when absent; a malformed or wrong-type block degrades safely to the default.

mode.description: worktree-per-plan (default-ON) spawns an isolated git worktree per plan unit; direct commits on the current branch (pre-design behavior); worktree-per-task spawns a per-task worktree for each operator-declared-isolated task (Isolated: true in PLAN.md) — execution isolation without forcing per-task PRs.

integration.description: pull-request (default) opens a PR when the plan unit completes; direct-push commits directly on the plan branch without opening a PR.
